changes: combined temporal_projection + output_layer into single output_projection Linear(64, 21) to fix tinygrad CPU codegen assertion on 3D tensor backward pass
reasoning: tinygrad 0.12.0 CPU backend crashes when Linear is applied to 3D tensors during backward. merging the two projection layers into one 2D linear avoids the bug while preserving model expressiveness

changes: added .relu() activation on the encoder+decoder skip connection output before feeding into output_projection
reasoning: the skip connection sum goes directly into a linear projection with no nonlinearity. adding relu gives the model a chance to learn more complex output mappings and prevents negative activations from dominating the projection

changes: changed hidden_size from 64 to 128 in DEFAULT_CONFIGURATION
reasoning: 500 input features compressed to 64 hidden units may be too aggressive. doubling capacity could allow richer representations. result: worse loss, likely overfitting with only 1 epoch on small synthetic dataset

changes: changed learning_rate from 0.003 to 0.001 in DEFAULT_CONFIGURATION
reasoning: with 1 epoch, 0.003 might overshoot. result: significantly worse - with only 1 pass through data, higher LR makes more progress. 0.003 is better for single-epoch training
